companyName.zh: 雀巢 —— 开发组合动作

summary.en: Nestlé illustrates Exploit portfolio management: the company manages mature categories through acquire, partner, improve, and divest actions rather than treating the existing business portfolio as static.
summary.zh: 雀巢展示了 Exploit 开发组合管理：公司通过收购、合作、改善和剥离等动作管理成熟品类，而不是把现有业务组合当成静态资产。

sources.label: Alexander Osterwalder, Yves Pigneur, Fred Etiemble & Alan Smith · The Invincible Company · Wiley · 2020 · Nestlé portfolio example
Nestlé investor day and public portfolio materials

project.name: Nestlé — exploit portfolio actions

stories.title: Nestlé exploit portfolio actions
stories.contentMd:
# Nestlé exploit portfolio actions

Nestlé is useful for reading the Exploit side of the Portfolio Map. The important lesson is that mature categories still require active management. A portfolio can be improved through acquire, partner, improve, divest, and dismantle decisions.

## Portfolio reading

The map separates large current categories from portfolio actions. Beverages and pet care are existing engines; licensing, acquisitions, and plant-based bets are moves around the edge of the current portfolio. Strategic reviews and divestments show that exploit management is not just growth, but also pruning.

## Transfer lesson

For incumbents, portfolio discipline means asking whether every business still earns its place. Improving and divesting can be as strategic as launching something new.

stories.title: 雀巢开发组合动作
stories.contentMd:
# 雀巢开发组合动作

雀巢适合用来阅读 Portfolio Map 的 Exploit 开发侧。关键经验是：成熟品类也需要主动管理。一个组合可以通过收购、合作、改善、剥离和拆除等动作持续更新。

## 组合阅读

组合图把大型现有品类和组合动作分开。饮料和宠物护理是现有增长引擎；授权、收购和植物基食品下注则是围绕现有组合边缘展开的动作。战略审查和剥离说明，开发组合管理不只是增长，也包括修剪。

## 转移经验

对成熟公司来说，组合纪律意味着持续追问每项业务是否仍然值得留在组合里。改善和剥离与推出新业务一样具有战略意义。
